creator: chuck@pkix.net
text:
On May 2, 2009, at 6:50 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of textproc/raptor,
>
> Please note that PR ports/134159 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/134159

Hi--

Sorry for the delay, this email caught me in the middle of a cross- 
country business trip.  Anyway, yes, I approve the patch.

Regards,
-- 
-Chuck
